title: Rajjan Shinghal
text: Home * People * Rajjan Shinghal Rajjan Shinghal , an Indian Canadian computer scientist, artificial intelligence researcher and professor emeritus in computer science at the Concordia University in Montreal with research interests on expert systems and pattern recognition . In his 1985 paper along with Agata Muszycka-Jones An empirical comparison of pruning strategies in game trees , NegaScout and PVS was concluded superior to Alpha-Beta in practice [1] .
